basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released the official Project Officer Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Master's Degree in Business Administration or a Postgraduate Degree from a reputed institution are eligible to apply online on or before 13-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in business administration or Post Graduate Degree from a reputed institution
qualification.details: A master's degree in business administration, or a Post Graduate Degree from a reputed institution. At least 5-7 years of Industry experience or relevant Academic Institutional experience with an understanding of business concepts, management practices and unique aspects of the Indian business eco system. Good communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with a diverse range of stakeholders, proficiency in English and digital tools. Prior exposure to case study-related academic or administrative activities is desirable.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Madras Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Madras Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A master's degree in business administration, or a Post Graduate Degree from a reputed institution. At least 5-7 years of Industry experience or relevant Academic Institutional experience with an understanding of business concepts, management practices and unique aspects of the Indian business eco system. Good communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact effectively with a diverse range of stakeholders, proficiency in English and digital tools. Prior exposure to case study-related academic or administrative activities is desirable.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Project Officer post at IIT Madras is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Master's degree in business administration or a Post Graduate Degree from a reputed institution. Additional industry or academic experience is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Officer position at IIT Madras as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Officer position ranges from Rs. 27,500 to Rs. 1,00,000 per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Madras Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Officer role at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on the online application, followed by a test/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Officer position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the IIT Madras Project Officer recruitment must be submitted online only through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Madras for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment, where you can find more details and apply, is https://icandsr.iitm.ac.in.
